raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a charge with XXXX car rental for forging a document. I contacted XXXX and they were unwilling to give me a credit. I then disputed with CITI and they told me they are unable to continue the dispute as we have determined the merchant is unwilling to issue a credit. Then they told me to contact the merchant directly which I already did. Im not sure how this is legal at all. They are the bank they can take the refund if they deem necessary and that the charges were fraudulent.
